title: Manager Database Engineering (MongoDB)
description:
At Allstate, great things happen when our people work together to protect families and their belongings from life’s uncertainties. And for more than 90 years, our innovative drive has kept us a step ahead of our customers’ evolving needs. From advocating for seat belts, air bags and graduated driving laws, to being an industry leader in pricing sophistication, telematics, and, more recently, device and identity protection.

**Job Description**


We are seeking a Managing Engineer to lead our Database \& Platform Engineering team responsible for on prem and cloud databases (MySQL, Redis, MongoDB, and MongoDB Atlas etc). You will manage a team of Database Administrators/Platform Engineers who build, operate, and evolve the platform services that enable product teams to ship features safely and quickly. This role combines people leadership, technical ownership of database platform architecture, and hands on partnering with product and SRE teams to deliver operational excellence.**Key responsibilities**

* Manage, mentor, and grow a team of Database Administrators / Platform Engineers (hiring, performance reviews, career development, coaching).
* Own the technical roadmap for database platform services (MySQL, Redis, MongoDB on prem, and MongoDB Atlas), driving improvements in scalability, availability, performance, and cost.
* Lead platform engineering work: installation, configuration, upgrades, automation, backup/restore, patching, capacity planning, and runbooks for production systems.
* Design and implement database architecture and operational patterns (sharding/replication strategies, high availability, disaster recovery, backup retention, and failover).
* Build and improve CI/CD and automation pipelines for database provisioning, schema changes, migrations, and configuration management.
* Partner with product engineering, SRE, security, and cloud teams to define SLAs/SLOs, incident response, root cause analysis, and risk mitigation.
* Establish monitoring, alerting, and observability for database health and performance. Drive proactive incident prevention.
* Define and enforce standards, best practices, and governance for database access, security, backups, and compliance.
* Participate in design reviews, capacity planning, and product inception to translate feature requirements into scalable data solutions.
* Lead post incident reviews and continuous improvement initiatives to reduce mean time to detect and recover.
* Represent the database platform across cross functional initiatives and influence long term architecture decisions.

**Essential (required) qualifications**

* 7\+ years total experience in database administration, data platform engineering, or related roles with 3\+ years in a people management or technical leadership capacity.
* Proven experience managing production deployments both on premises and in cloud environments.
* Understanding of database internals, replication, sharding, performance tuning, and backup/restore strategies.
* Experience with automation and orchestration tools
* Familiar with CI/CD concepts and tools used to automate schema migrations and platform changes.
* Strong incident management experience and ability to lead technical incident response.
* Excellent communication skills; ability to partner with vendor, product, SRE, security, and engineering leadership.

**Preferred qualifications**

* Experience with managed database services (MongoDB Atlas, Amazon RDS, Aurora, Azure, ElastiCache) and hybrid cloud architectures.
* Familiarity with observability stacks (Datadog etc) and log aggregation.
* Knowledge of security and compliance controls relevant to data stores (encryption at rest/in transit, IAM, auditing).
* Experience with large‑scale data migrations and cross‑region replication.
* Relevant certifications (MongoDB Certified DBA, AWS/Azure//GCP certifications).

**Supervisory responsibilities**

* Directly manage a team of 4\-10 Database Administrators / Platform Engineers. Responsible for staffing, performance management, career development, and setting team goals and KPIs. Collaborates with hiring managers and senior leadership on resourcing and budget priorities.

**Primary Skills**


Amazon ElastiCache, Amazon ElastiCache, Amazon Relational Database Service (RDS), Analytical Thinking, Business Strategies, Cloud Architectures, Coaching, Collaboration, Collaborative Development, Communication, Compliance, Computer Backups, Continuous Improvement, Continuous Improvement Initiatives, Cross\-Functional Teamwork, Customer Relationship Management (CRM), Data Analytics, Database Administration, Database Architecture, Database Internals, Databasing, Disaster Recovery (DR), Employee Performance Evaluations, Executive Leadership, Failover {\+ 22 more}**Shift Time**

**Recruiter Info**


Yateesh B G
ybgaa@allstate.com**About Allstate**

**Joining our team isn’t just a job — it’s an opportunity. One that takes your skills and pushes them to the next level. One that encourages you to challenge the status quo. One where you can shape the future of protection while supporting causes that mean the most to you. Joining our team means being part of something bigger – a winning team making a meaningful impact.**


The Allstate Corporation is one of the largest publicly held insurance providers in the United States. Ranked No. 84 in the 2023 Fortune 500 list of the largest United States corporations by total revenue, The Allstate Corporation owns and operates 18 companies in the United States, Canada, Northern Ireland, and India. Allstate India Private Limited, also known as Allstate India, is a subsidiary of The Allstate Corporation. The India talent center was set up in 2012 and operates under the corporation's Good Hands promise. As it innovates operations and technology, Allstate India has evolved beyond its technology functions to be the critical strategic business services arm of the corporation. With offices in Bengaluru and Pune, the company offers expertise to the parent organization’s business areas including technology and innovation, accounting and imaging services, policy administration, transformation solution design and support services, transformation of property liability service design, global operations and integration, and training and transition.


Learn more about Allstate India here.

title: Senior Engineer (Remote, Full-Time) [AR012]
description:
**About Smart Working**  

At Smart Working, we believe your job should not only look right on paper but also feel right every day. This isn't just another remote opportunity—it's about finding where you truly belong, no matter where you are. From day one, you're welcomed into a genuine community that values your growth and well\-being.



Our mission is simple: to break down geographic barriers and connect skilled professionals with outstanding global teams and products for full\-time, long\-term roles. We help you discover meaningful work with teams that invest in your success, where you're empowered to grow personally and professionally.



Join one of the highest\-rated workplaces on Glassdoor and experience what it means to thrive in a truly remote\-first world.

  

**About the Role**
------------------



We are looking for a Senior Engineer to own the technical direction of a product domain, drive feature discovery, and ensure delivery of scalable, high\-quality solutions. You will lead architecture decisions, improve engineering practices, mentor engineers, manage technical risks, and collaborate with Product and Design teams to translate business needs into effective technical solutions.



This role focuses on building strong engineering foundations, improving delivery processes, and shaping the technical roadmap through the next 12–18 months.



### **Responsibilities**


* Own the Feature Discovery phase for new work within your domain.
* Produce high\-quality Discovery outputs, including specifications, technical assessments, and risk registers that development teams can execute against without follow\-up.
* Architect scalable, reliable, and maintainable systems that provide a strong foundation for future development.
* Drive technical decision\-making and maintain the technical health of your domain.
* Identify technical debt and create prioritised plans for continuous improvement.
* Proactively manage risks and dependencies across features and initiatives.
* Translate technical trade\-offs and recommendations for Product, Design, and other non\-technical stakeholders.
* Ensure teams consistently have well\-scoped, well\-estimated, development\-ready work.
* Own technical delivery and Discovery activities within a defined domain.
* Mentor Junior and Mid\-level Engineers, supporting their growth through structured guidance and feedback.
* Participate in hiring activities and evaluate engineering talent against established standards.
* Set and maintain standards for AI tool usage within Discovery and development workflows.
* Contribute to a culture of engineering excellence, collaboration, and continuous improvement.
### **Requirements**


* End\-to\-end ownership of technical Discovery processes, including specifications, technical assessments, and risk registers.
* Strong architectural and system design skills, with the ability to build scalable, reliable, and maintainable solutions.
* Ability to identify, manage, and mitigate technical risks, dependencies, and technical debt.
* Experience owning technical outcomes and maintaining the technical health of a product domain.
* Ability to translate technical decisions and trade\-offs for Product, Design, and other non\-technical stakeholders.
* Experience mentoring Junior and Mid\-level Engineers and supporting their professional growth.
* Experience participating in hiring and evaluating engineering talent.
* Strong technical communication, planning, prioritisation, and cross\-functional collaboration skills.
* Ability to establish and promote effective AI\-assisted Discovery and development practices.
### **Nice to Have**


* Experience running or contributing to cross\-functional technical planning sessions.
* Familiarity with both frontend and backend systems within a product environment.
* Experience evaluating AI\-powered product features from both technical and commercial perspectives.
### **Benefits**


* Fixed Shifts: 12:00 PM \- 9:30 PM IST (Summer) \\u007C 1:00 PM \- 10:30 PM IST (Winter)
* No Weekend Work: Real work\-life balance, not just words
* Day 1 Benefits: Laptop and full medical insurance provided
* Support That Matters: Mentorship, community, and forums where ideas are shared
* True Belonging: A long\-term career where your contributions are valued
* 5\-Day AI Training: Hands\-on AI Academy onboarding to get you building with AI from day one


We may use artificial intelligence (AI) tools to support parts of the hiring process, such as reviewing applications, analyzing resumes, or assessing responses and identifying potential inconsistencies or verification signals in application materials based on available information. These tools assist our recruitment team but do not replace human judgment. Final hiring decisions are ultimately made by humans. If you would like more information about how your data is processed, please contact us.

title: Senior Data Engineer (Remote, Contractual) [TH003]
description:
**About Smart Working**



At Smart Working, we believe your job should not only look right on paper but also feel right every day. This isn't just another remote opportunity—it's about finding where you truly belong, no matter where you are. From day one, you're welcomed into a genuine community that values your growth and well\-being.



Our mission is simple: to break down geographic barriers and connect skilled professionals with outstanding global teams and products for full\-time, long\-term roles. We help you discover meaningful work with teams that invest in your success, where you're empowered to grow personally and professionally.



Join one of the highest\-rated workplaces on Glassdoor and experience what it means to thrive in a truly remote\-first world.

  


**About the Role**



We are seeking a highly experienced Senior Data Engineer on a contract basis to join an expanding data team supporting multiple leading iGaming and casino brands, with a particular focus on Metawin and HIT, both of which have a strong crypto focus. This role offers the opportunity to make a direct impact on the organisation’s data platform and roadmap delivery. You will play a critical role in optimising and modernising the data ecosystem, improving performance across Snowflake, developing scalable ingestion and transformation pipelines, and helping drive the transition towards real\-time data processing.



You will work closely with data science teams, product teams, operations, and other stakeholders in a fast\-paced environment where collaboration, clear communication, and documentation are highly valued. The organisation embraces AI\-first ways of working, and you will be expected to leverage tools such as Claude, GitHub Copilot, Gemini, and other AI assistants to improve productivity, automate repetitive tasks, and accelerate development.



This is an excellent opportunity for a Senior Data Engineer with deep AWS, Snowflake, and dbt expertise who is ready to hit the ground running and contribute immediately within a modern data platform environment.


### **Responsibilities**


* Manage and optimise Snowflake data warehouses.
* Overhaul Snowflake warehouse performance through materialisation strategies, dynamic tables, and clustering optimisation.
* Build scalable ETL/ELT pipelines using dbt, Airflow, Fivetran, and AWS DMS.
* Build ingestion pipelines using DMS and Fivetran.
* Develop modelling layers in dbt using medallion architecture principles.
* Transform raw data into clean, reliable, and business\-ready models using dbt and AI\-assisted tooling for documentation and testing.
* Integrate data from multiple sources, including CRM systems, payment platforms, gaming platforms, and other operational systems.
* Own initiatives focused on data quality improvements and monitoring, including anomaly detection and automated alerting.
* Monitor and optimise platform performance, cost efficiency, and security.
* Work closely with cross\-functional teams across product development, data, operations, and analytics functions.
* Collaborate with the data science team and support colleagues with reporting and analytics activities when required.
* Support the organisation’s move towards real\-time data ingestion and ETL using technologies such as DMS, Kafka, and Kinesis.
* Help mentor other engineers within the team.
* Contribute to the team's AI strategy and promote effective use of AI tools across engineering workflows.
* Produce and maintain clear, comprehensive documentation to support scalability, transparency, and long\-term platform sustainability.
* Communicate effectively with both technical and non\-technical stakeholders and proactively raise blockers when encountered.
### **Requirements**


* 7\+ years in Data Engineering.
* Solid hands\-on experience with AWS.
* You really know ELT design and data warehousing best practices.
* You're an expert in optimising Snowflake.
* You're a dbt pro (macros, testing, modularisation).
* Excellent SQL and Python skills.
* Good CI/CD and Git skills.
* You have used AI coding assistants to work efficiently.
### **Nice To Haves**


* Experience building pipeline to handle high\-volume data.
* Know the iGaming lingo (GGR, LTV, RTP, acquisition KPIs).
* Experience with affiliate or game provider data feeds.
* Familiarity with real\-time data ingestion.
* Exposure to data science/ML pipelines (SageMaker, Bedrock).
* Used AI tools for monitoring or query optimisation before.
* QuickSight experience (especially SPICE/Direct Query).
### **Benefits**


* Fixed Shifts: 12:00 PM \- 9:30 PM IST (Summer) \\u007C 1:00 PM \- 10:30 PM IST (Winter)
* No Weekend Work: Real work\-life balance, not just words
* Support That Matters: Mentorship, community, and forums where ideas are shared
* True Belonging: A long\-term career where your contributions are valued


We may use artificial intelligence (AI) tools to support parts of the hiring process, such as reviewing applications, analyzing resumes, or assessing responses and identifying potential inconsistencies or verification signals in application materials based on available information. These tools assist our recruitment team but do not replace human judgment. Final hiring decisions are ultimately made by humans. If you would like more information about how your data is processed, please contact us.

* Transform raw data into clean, reliable, and business\-ready models using dbt and AI\-assisted tooling for documentation and testing.
* Integrate data from multiple sources, including CRM systems, payment platforms, gaming platforms, and other operational systems.
* Own initiatives focused on data quality improvements and monitoring, including anomaly detection and automated alerting.
* Monitor and optimise platform performance, cost efficiency, and security.
* Work closely with cross\-functional teams across product development, data, operations, and analytics functions.
* Collaborate with the data science team and support colleagues with reporting and analytics activities when required.
* Support the organisation’s move towards real\-time data ingestion and ETL using technologies such as DMS, Kafka, and Kinesis.
* Help mentor other engineers within the team.
* Contribute to the team's AI strategy and promote effective use of AI tools across engineering workflows.
* Produce and maintain clear, comprehensive documentation to support scalability, transparency, and long\-term platform sustainability.
* Communicate effectively with both technical and non\-technical stakeholders and proactively raise blockers when encountered.
### **Requirements**


* 7\+ years in Data Engineering.
* Solid hands\-on experience with AWS.
* You really know ELT design and data warehousing best practices.
* You're an expert in optimising Snowflake.
* You're a dbt pro (macros, testing, modularisation).
* Excellent SQL and Python skills.
* Good CI/CD and Git skills.
* You have used AI coding assistants to work efficiently.
### **Nice To Haves**


* Experience building pipeline to handle high\-volume data.
* Know the iGaming lingo (GGR, LTV, RTP, acquisition KPIs).
* Experience with affiliate or game provider data feeds.
* Familiarity with real\-time data ingestion.
* Exposure to data science/ML pipelines (SageMaker, Bedrock).
* Used AI tools for monitoring or query optimisation before.
* QuickSight experience (especially SPICE/Direct Query).
### **Benefits**


* Fixed Shifts: 12:00 PM \- 9:30 PM IST (Summer) \\u007C 1:00 PM \- 10:30 PM IST (Winter)
* No Weekend Work: Real work\-life balance, not just words
* Support That Matters: Mentorship, community, and forums where ideas are shared
* True Belonging: A long\-term career where your contributions are valued


We may use artificial intelligence (AI) tools to support parts of the hiring process, such as reviewing applications, analyzing resumes, or assessing responses and identifying potential inconsistencies or verification signals in application materials based on available information. These tools assist our recruitment team but do not replace human judgment. Final hiring decisions are ultimately made by humans. If you would like more information about how your data is processed, please contact us.

* Set and maintain standards for AI tool usage within Discovery and development workflows.

* End\-to\-end ownership of technical Discovery processes, including specifications, technical assessments, and risk registers.
* Strong architectural and system design skills, with the ability to build scalable, reliable, and maintainable solutions.
* Ability to identify, manage, and mitigate technical risks, dependencies, and technical debt.
* Experience owning technical outcomes and maintaining the technical health of a product domain.
* Ability to translate technical decisions and trade\-offs for Product, Design, and other non\-technical stakeholders.
* Experience mentoring Junior and Mid\-level Engineers and supporting their professional growth.
* Experience participating in hiring and evaluating engineering talent.
* Strong technical communication, planning, prioritisation, and cross\-functional collaboration skills.
* Ability to establish and promote effective AI\-assisted Discovery and development practices.

* Experience running or contributing to cross\-functional technical planning sessions.
* Familiarity with both frontend and backend systems within a product environment.
* Experience evaluating AI\-powered product features from both technical and commercial perspectives.

* Fixed Shifts: 12:00 PM \- 9:30 PM IST (Summer) \\u007C 1:00 PM \- 10:30 PM IST (Winter)

* Communicate effectively with both technical and non\-technical stakeholders and proactively raise blockers when encountered.
### **Requirements**

* Solid hands\-on experience with AWS.
* You really know ELT design and data warehousing best practices.

* You're a dbt pro (macros, testing, modularisation).

title: Senior Data Engineer (Remote, Contractual) [TH003]
description:
**About Smart Working**



At Smart Working, we believe your job should not only look right on paper but also feel right every day. This isn't just another remote opportunity—it's about finding where you truly belong, no matter where you are. From day one, you're welcomed into a genuine community that values your growth and well\-being.



Our mission is simple: to break down geographic barriers and connect skilled professionals with outstanding global teams and products for full\-time, long\-term roles. We help you discover meaningful work with teams that invest in your success, where you're empowered to grow personally and professionally.



Join one of the highest\-rated workplaces on Glassdoor and experience what it means to thrive in a truly remote\-first world.

  


**About the Role**



We are seeking a highly experienced Senior Data Engineer on a contract basis to join an expanding data team supporting multiple leading iGaming and casino brands, with a particular focus on Metawin and HIT, both of which have a strong crypto focus. This role offers the opportunity to make a direct impact on the organisation’s data platform and roadmap delivery. You will play a critical role in optimising and modernising the data ecosystem, improving performance across Snowflake, developing scalable ingestion and transformation pipelines, and helping drive the transition towards real\-time data processing.



You will work closely with data science teams, product teams, operations, and other stakeholders in a fast\-paced environment where collaboration, clear communication, and documentation are highly valued. The organisation embraces AI\-first ways of working, and you will be expected to leverage tools such as Claude, GitHub Copilot, Gemini, and other AI assistants to improve productivity, automate repetitive tasks, and accelerate development.



This is an excellent opportunity for a Senior Data Engineer with deep AWS, Snowflake, and dbt expertise who is ready to hit the ground running and contribute immediately within a modern data platform environment.


### **Responsibilities**


* Manage and optimise Snowflake data warehouses.
* Overhaul Snowflake warehouse performance through materialisation strategies, dynamic tables, and clustering optimisation.
* Build scalable ETL/ELT pipelines using dbt, Airflow, Fivetran, and AWS DMS.
* Build ingestion pipelines using DMS and Fivetran.
* Develop modelling layers in dbt using medallion architecture principles.
* Transform raw data into clean, reliable, and business\-ready models using dbt and AI\-assisted tooling for documentation and testing.
* Integrate data from multiple sources, including CRM systems, payment platforms, gaming platforms, and other operational systems.
* Own initiatives focused on data quality improvements and monitoring, including anomaly detection and automated alerting.
* Monitor and optimise platform performance, cost efficiency, and security.
* Work closely with cross\-functional teams across product development, data, operations, and analytics functions.
* Collaborate with the data science team and support colleagues with reporting and analytics activities when required.
* Support the organisation’s move towards real\-time data ingestion and ETL using technologies such as DMS, Kafka, and Kinesis.
* Help mentor other engineers within the team.
* Contribute to the team's AI strategy and promote effective use of AI tools across engineering workflows.
* Produce and maintain clear, comprehensive documentation to support scalability, transparency, and long\-term platform sustainability.
* Communicate effectively with both technical and non\-technical stakeholders and proactively raise blockers when encountered.
### **Requirements**


* 7\+ years in Data Engineering.
* Solid hands\-on experience with AWS.
* You really know ELT design and data warehousing best practices.
* You're an expert in optimising Snowflake.
* You're a dbt pro (macros, testing, modularisation).
* Excellent SQL and Python skills.
* Good CI/CD and Git skills.
* You have used AI coding assistants to work efficiently.
### **Nice To Haves**


* Experience building pipeline to handle high\-volume data.
* Know the iGaming lingo (GGR, LTV, RTP, acquisition KPIs).
* Experience with affiliate or game provider data feeds.
* Familiarity with real\-time data ingestion.
* Exposure to data science/ML pipelines (SageMaker, Bedrock).
* Used AI tools for monitoring or query optimisation before.
* QuickSight experience (especially SPICE/Direct Query).
### **Benefits**


* Fixed Shifts: 12:00 PM \- 9:30 PM IST (Summer) \\u007C 1:00 PM \- 10:30 PM IST (Winter)

title: Sr. Director, Product Management (Revenue Products)
description:
**About HighLevel**



HighLevel is an all\-in\-one sales, marketing, and customer engagement platform built to help agencies and businesses grow. Our platform powers critical revenue\-generating workflows across communications, marketing automation, CRM, payments, reputation, and customer engagement.



We are looking for a **Senior Director of Product Management, Revenue Products** to lead the strategy, execution, and business performance of HighLevel’s top revenue\-generating products, including **Phone / CPaaS, Email, WhatsApp**, and other usage\-based or subscription\-based product lines.


**About the Role**



The Senior Director of Product Management, Revenue Products will own the product vision, business strategy, P\&L performance, pricing and packaging, user experience, adoption, and growth execution for a portfolio of monetized products that are central to HighLevel’s revenue growth.



This leader will operate at the intersection of product, revenue, finance, growth, customer success, support, engineering, design, and operations. They will be responsible for building scalable product strategies that increase customer value, drive adoption, improve margins, expand monetization, and deliver measurable revenue growth.



The ideal candidate has deep experience managing revenue\-generating SaaS, usage\-based, or communications products and is comfortable owning both product outcomes and business outcomes.


**Key Responsibilities**


**Product Strategy \& Portfolio Ownership**


* Own the product strategy and roadmap for HighLevel’s revenue\-generating products, including Phone / CPaaS, Email, WhatsApp, and other usage\-based or subscription\-based products.
* Define the long\-term vision for each product area, ensuring alignment with HighLevel’s broader company strategy, customer needs, market trends, and revenue objectives.
* Prioritize product investments across a portfolio of revenue products based on customer impact, revenue potential, margin profile, adoption opportunity, and strategic importance.
* Develop clear product narratives, business cases, and strategic recommendations for executive leadership.

**P\&L Ownership \& Business Performance**


* Own the business performance of assigned product lines, including revenue growth, gross margin, usage trends, attach rate, adoption, retention, and profitability.
* Partner with Finance, RevOps, Data, and executive leadership to establish revenue targets, forecast performance, identify growth opportunities, and manage tradeoffs.
* Analyze product\-level financial performance and customer behavior to identify opportunities to improve monetization, reduce cost, increase margins, and drive sustainable growth.
* Make data\-informed decisions around pricing, cost structure, product investment, packaging, and go\-to\-market execution.

**Pricing, Packaging \& Monetization**


* Lead pricing and packaging strategy for revenue\-generating products, including usage\-based pricing, subscription tiers, add\-ons, bundles, overages, and margin optimization.
* Evaluate customer willingness to pay, competitive positioning, usage behavior, and business economics to create pricing models that maximize customer value and company revenue.
* Partner with Marketing, Sales, Customer Success, Support, and Finance to launch pricing and packaging changes effectively.
* Continuously test and optimize monetization strategies to improve conversion, expansion, retention, and product profitability.

**User Experience \& Product Execution**


* Drive a best\-in\-class user experience across revenue products, ensuring products are intuitive, reliable, easy to adopt, and valuable for agencies and their customers.
* Partner closely with Design, Engineering, Data, and Customer Support to identify friction points, improve workflows, and deliver high\-quality product experiences.
* Translate complex communications, compliance, billing, and usage\-based product requirements into simple, scalable customer experiences.
* Ensure product experiences support both self\-serve adoption and assisted customer success motions.

**Adoption, Growth \& Lifecycle Execution**


* Own product\-led growth initiatives that increase activation, adoption, usage, expansion, and retention across assigned products.
* Develop strategies to increase attach rate and usage of Phone, Email, WhatsApp, and related products across HighLevel’s customer base.
* Partner with Growth, Marketing, Lifecycle, Customer Success, and Education teams to create in\-app experiences, campaigns, onboarding flows, documentation, and enablement that drive adoption.
* Identify opportunities to increase revenue per customer through cross\-sell, upsell, bundling, and improved product discovery.

**Market, Customer \& Competitive Insights**


* Maintain a deep understanding of customer needs, agency workflows, communications trends, CPaaS market dynamics, email deliverability, WhatsApp business messaging, compliance requirements, and competitive offerings.
* Regularly engage with customers, agencies, internal teams, and partners to identify unmet needs and emerging opportunities.
* Use qualitative and quantitative insights to inform product strategy, roadmap decisions, and go\-to\-market priorities.

**Cross\-Functional Leadership**


* Lead cross\-functional product initiatives across Engineering, Design, Data, Marketing, Sales, Customer Success, Support, Finance, Legal, Compliance, and Operations.
* Communicate product strategy, priorities, tradeoffs, and business performance clearly to executives and stakeholders.
* Create strong operating rhythms around planning, execution, reporting, experimentation, and performance reviews.
* Influence without authority across the organization to drive alignment and ensure successful execution.

**Team Leadership**


* Lead, mentor, and develop a team of product managers responsible for revenue\-generating products.
* Set a high bar for product thinking, business ownership, customer empathy, analytical rigor, execution quality, and communication.
* Build a culture of accountability, experimentation, data\-driven decision\-making, and customer obsession.
* Help recruit, retain, and grow high\-performing product talent.

**What Success Looks Like**



Success in this role will be measured by the ability to drive meaningful business and customer outcomes across HighLevel’s revenue products, including:


* Increased revenue from Phone / CPaaS, Email, WhatsApp, and other monetized products.
* Improved gross margins and product\-level profitability.
* Higher product adoption, activation, and usage across the customer base.
* Improved attach rate, expansion revenue, and retention.
* Successful pricing and packaging improvements.
* Reduced customer friction and stronger product usability.
* Clear product strategy and execution across multiple cross\-functional teams.
* A high\-performing product team with strong ownership and execution discipline.

**Required Qualifications**


* 15\+ years of product management experience, with at least 4\+ years leading product teams.
* Experience owning revenue\-generating SaaS, usage\-based, subscription, marketplace, payments, communications, or platform products.
* Demonstrated success managing product\-level business outcomes, including revenue, adoption, retention, pricing, packaging, and profitability.
* Strong understanding of P\&L ownership, monetization strategy, unit economics, margin optimization, and business forecasting.
* Experience developing and launching pricing and packaging strategies for SaaS or usage\-based products.
* Proven ability to define product strategy, build roadmaps, align stakeholders, and execute across complex product portfolios.
* Strong analytical skills with the ability to use data to identify opportunities, evaluate tradeoffs, and measure impact.
* Experience partnering closely with Engineering, Design, Finance, Marketing, Sales, Customer Success, Support, and executive teams.
* Excellent communication and executive presentation skills.
* Strong leadership skills with experience hiring, mentoring, and developing product managers.

**Preferred Qualifications**


* Experience with CPaaS, telephony, messaging, email, WhatsApp Business, communications APIs, or usage\-based communications products.
* Experience with email deliverability, sender reputation, messaging compliance, carrier registration, A2P 10DLC, WhatsApp Business Platform, or similar regulated communications environments.
* Experience with PLG, self\-serve SaaS, agency\-focused platforms, SMB products, or multi\-tenant SaaS platforms.
* Experience scaling products with complex billing, metering, usage tracking, credits, wallet systems, or consumption\-based pricing.
* Experience working in a high\-growth SaaS company.
* Strong understanding of agency workflows, marketing automation, CRM, customer engagement, or small business software.

**Ideal Candidate Profile**



The ideal candidate is a business\-minded product leader who can think like a GM, operate like a product strategist, and execute like a growth leader. They are equally comfortable discussing customer pain points, product design, pricing models, revenue forecasts, margin performance, and technical tradeoffs.



They bring a strong sense of ownership, high intellectual curiosity, deep customer empathy, and a bias toward measurable impact. They are energized by leading products that directly contribute to company growth and are comfortable being accountable for both customer outcomes and financial results.


**Key Competencies**



Product strategy  

P\&L ownership  

Pricing and packaging  

Usage\-based monetization  

Customer experience  

Product\-led growth  

Data\-driven decision\-making  

Cross\-functional leadership  

Executive communication  

Team development  

SaaS business models  

Revenue growth execution  

Margin optimization  

Customer adoption and retention



**EEO Statement**



The company is an Equal Opportunity Employer. As an employer subject to affirmative action regulations, we invite you to voluntarily provide the following demographic information. This information is used solely for compliance with government record keeping, reporting, and other legal requirements. Providing this information is voluntary and refusal to do so will not affect your application status. This data will be kept separate from your application and will not be used in the hiring decision.

  


We encourage you to review our Privacy Policy before submitting your application

These tools assist our recruitment team but do not replace human judgment. Final hiring decisions are ultimately made by humans. title: Python Backend Developer + Gen AI
description:
job Responsibilities:

10\+ Years

As a Expert Python Developer, you will own the technical implementation of the platform's orchestration layer. You will build the lightweight Python SDK that serves as the primary interface between domain\-specific agents (like Lease Abstraction and CAM Reconciliation) and core platform services. Your work will ensure that agents operate within secure, ephemeral sandboxes (Firecracker MicroVMs) while enforcing strict multi\-tenant isolation and identity management via WorkOS.

Key Responsibilities

* Platform Control Plane \& AI Gateway: Architect and maintain the central platform Control Plane and API Gateway using FastAPI, handling critical functions such as LLM routing, telemetry, and per\-tenant cost metering.
* Agentic SDK Engineering: Lead the development of the Tango Python SDK, abstracting complex LLM routing and providing a standardized interface for "Human\-in\-the\-Loop" (HITL) escalations and agent overrides.
* Durable Workflow Orchestration: Implement and manage long\-running, multi\-stage agentic workflows using Temporal to ensure reliable execution of complex real estate processes.
* Multi\-Tenant Backend Services: Build scalable, secure RESTful APIs for the Admin Console, managing complex CRUD operations and ensuring strict logical data isolation across tenants.
* Infrastructure \& Security Integration: Collaborate with DevSecOps to deploy backend services via Kubernetes and integrate WorkOS for B2B identity, SSO, and fine\-grained Role\-Based Access Control (RBAC).
* Data Architecture \& MCP: Interface with specialized data stores including PostgreSQL, GraphDB (Neo4j), and Vector Databases (ChromaDB) using the Model Context Protocol (MCP) to ensure agents consume data securely without direct database access.
* LLM Gateway \& Cost Controls: Develop and operate the LLM gateway layer (LiteLLM): provider routing and failover (AWS Bedrock, Anthropic), rate limiting, token budget enforcement, runaway\-loop kill\-switches, and per\-run/per\-tenant cost metering.
* Production Operations: Participate in SLO definition, incident response, and DR runbook authoring; design for RTO/RPO targets from day one rather than retrofitting.
* Data \& Ingestion Pipelines: Build document ingestion pipelines (S3, queues, OCR handoff), schema evolution, and the data contracts through which agents consume tenant data securely , including integration with the client's existing data warehouse and Java/Spring Boot estate.
* Identity \& Access Integration: Integrate WorkOS for agent identity, on\-behalf\-of (OBO) user flows, SSO/SCIM for enterprise tenants, and audit\-grade attribution of every agent action and tool call.

Required Skills \& Experience

* Backend Mastery: Expert\-level proficiency in Python and FastAPI; significant experience building scalable, production\-grade RESTful APIs and microservices.
* AI Ecosystem \& Agentic Intelligence: Deep experience with LangChain and LangSmith; proven track record building multi\-step reasoning chains and tool\-use protocols for autonomous agents.
* Cloud \& Infrastructure: Strong experience with AWS (Bedrock, ECS, S3\) and containerization (Docker/Kubernetes). Understanding of Firecracker MicroVMs for agent sandboxing is a major plus.
* Orchestration \& Messaging: Hands\-on experience with Temporal for workflow orchestration and RabbitMQ or AWS SQS for event\-driven architectures.
* Security \& Identity: Proven experience implementing OAuth 2\.0 and integrating enterprise identity providers like WorkOS.
* Database Proficiency: Practical experience with relational (PostgreSQL), Graph (Neo4j/GraphDB), and Vector (ChromaDB/PGVector) databases.
* API Design: Demonstrated ability to design and version public\-facing APIs and client libraries that other engineering teams depend on.

Desirable

* Prodigy Framework: Familiarity with the Prodigy agentic framework is a significant advantage for this role.
* Domain Expertise: Understanding of Commercial Real Estate (CRE) workflows.
* Evaluation Literacy: Experience building programmatic "Evaluation Harnesses" to measure accuracy and hallucination rates in AI models.

Pay: ₹338,724\.32 \- ₹4,000,000\.00 per year

Work Location: Remote

title: AI Automation Specialist
description:
Job Description:

We are looking for an AI Automation Specialist who combines a strong design sense, marketing understanding, and AI automation skills to help us build intelligent workflows, improve business processes, and create AI\-powered solutions.

The ideal candidate is someone who understands both creative communication and technical automation — a person who can design better user experiences, automate repetitive marketing tasks, and integrate AI tools into real\-world workflows.

Responsibilities: Design and build AI\-powered automation workflows for marketing, operations, and business processes. Create AI agents and workflow automations using tools like n8n, Zapier, Make.com, and other automation platforms.

Use AI tools such as ChatGPT, Claude, Claude Code, Perplexity, and other LLM\-based tools to improve productivity and create solutions.

Develop automated systems for content creation, lead management, customer communication, research, and marketing operations. Understand marketing objectives and translate them into effective AI\-driven solutions.

Create visually appealing AI\-generated content, presentations, landing page concepts, and marketing assets with a strong design eye. Collaborate with design and marketing teams to improve campaigns using AI. Experiment with emerging AI tools and identify opportunities for automation.

Required Skills: Strong understanding of AI tools and their practical applications.

Hands\-on experience with automation platforms like: n8n Zapier Make.com

Ability to create and optimize AI workflows and automation pipelines. Good understanding of marketing concepts (content marketing, lead generation, customer journeys, analytics). Strong visual/design sense with the ability to evaluate creative output and improve AI\-generated designs.

Experience using AI tools for content, research, design, and productivity.

Good to Have: Basic programming knowledge (Python, JavaScript, APIs, webhooks). Experience working with databases, APIs, or no\-code/low\-code development. Familiarity with prompt engineering and AI agent development. Experience with tools like Claude Code, Cursor, Replit, or similar AI coding assistants. Background in graphic design, UI/UX design, branding, or digital marketing. Ideal Candidate Profile: You are someone who sits between creative and technical worlds — a designer who understands automation, a marketer who understands AI, or a builder who can combine creativity with technology.

You don’t just use AI tools; you understand how to turn them into scalable systems that save time, improve workflows, and create better customer experiences.

Experience Level: Entry\-level to Mid\-level (Internships and strong portfolios welcome)

Job Types: Full\-time, Permanent

title: Advisory Consultant - AI and Innovation
description:
**Who We Are**


Escalent is an award\-winning data analytics and advisory firm that helps clients understand human and market behaviors to navigate disruption. As catalysts of progress for more than 40 years, our strategies guide the world’s leading brands. We accelerate growth by creating a seamless flow between primary, secondary, syndicated, and internal business data, providing consulting and advisory services from insights through implementation. Based on a profound understanding of what drives human beings and markets, we identify actions that build brands, enhance customer experiences, inspire product innovation, and boost business productivity. We listen, learn, question, discover, innovate, and deliver—for each other and our clients—to make the world work better for people.


**Role Overview**


We are looking for a seasoned professional with expansive Strategy Research and/or Consulting experience, strong exposure to Workflow and Product Development, high degree of AI\-and\-tech savviness, and a Consultative and Impact oriented mindset. The ideal candidate will play an instrumental role in servicing Escalent’s plans to develop, integrate, adopt, and productize AI and innovation tools/capabilities/offerings, thereby allowing research, consulting, and corporate teams as well as our clients to benefit from AI’s capabilities to foster better, smarter, and efficient workflows.


Unlike typical advisory/consulting profiles, this role is not focused on core research and consulting. Instead, it will report to the SVP and Head of AI and Innovation and be a core part of an enterprise\-wide team that’s focused on formulating Escalent’s AI strategy, approach, and roadmap from the perspective of integrating AI tools/capabilities into research/consulting/corporate function workflows as well as developing in\-house and monetizable AI products/solutions.


**Detailed responsibilities follow**:


**Overall**


* Assume end\-to\-end ownership of key strategic initiatives in AI/automation/innovation, with a leading role in scoping, planning, executing, and scaling.
* Develop a strong understanding of Escalent group’s products, tools, solutions, and technological roadmap, and leverage it to pivot all AI initiatives, workflows, features, and products.
* Demonstrate a strong capability to link findings and recommendations to desired business impact.
* Present findings and recommendations, while explaining approach and rationale, to senior/executive leadership as and when needed.


**AI Product Development**


* Scope out research\-focused AI products/features/agents with a clear understanding of the use case, intended audience, and desired operational/business impact.
* Work with industry/methodology/technique SMEs, if needed, to chalk out the product/feature/agent workflow, input\-output mix, desired functioning, and forward\-looking roadmap.
* Where applicable, co\-develop the development/implementation and scaling plan, in collaboration with the tech, development, and product teams.
* Where applicable/possible, adopt a hands\-on approach on low\-code/no\-code/vibe\-code agent development tools/environments to create the tool/agent.
* Craft and co\-implement alpha and beta testing plans, and internal and external rollout roadmaps, to ensure controlled testing, scaled launch, robust adoption, and continuous improvement.
* Double up as an alpha tester focused on ‘breaking’ the product/feature/agent to ensure adequate stress\-testing under various edge cases.
* Own the feature and scaling roadmap, and hold the product, tech, development, and infrastructure teams accountable for their respective tasks and timelines.
* Organize and administer demos, show\-n\-tells, and lunch\-n\-learns among internal/external audiences to socialize the product/feature/agent, resolve queries, foster adoption, and gather constructive and actionable feedback.


**AI Advisory**

* Support revenue growth and client delight by:
	+ Providing product/domain/subject matter expertise on AI/innovation as part of account farming conversations,
	+ Contributing to client RFPs/proposals on all things AI, innovation, and automation.
	+ Addressing AI\-related questionnaires and contract reviews to alleviate any client or compliance concerns regarding the use of AI by demonstrating Escalent’s deliberate, outcome\-focused, human\-centered, and strategically and technologically robust approach to AI.
* 3P Toolkit Due Diligence and Expansion
	+ Identify relevant AI/innovation tools for any use case, via desk research and internal outreach.
	+ Liaise with various tool vendors to understand functional possibilities, evaluate use case fitment, and assess commercial viability.
	+ Partner with Compliance and IT teams to vet and whitelist specific tools for test/trials.
	+ Conceptualize a trial program and secure licenses for testing.
	+ Partner with domain/functional/corporate teams to test various tools to assess their effectiveness and value\-add.
* Address internal queries on AI, innovation, and automation tools/techniques/approaches to ensure teams know when (and when not) to use AI, how to use it effectively \+ efficiently \+ ethically, which tool/feature/product/agent to leverage, and where to avoid pitfalls.


**AI Thought Leadership**


* Work with enterprise marketing and other internal team(s) to prepare AI/innovation product dossiers, thought leadership POVs and blogs, consultative whitepapers, etc.
* Exhibit a strong passion for AI and innovation, and stay updated on the latest developments, trends, product/model launches, etc. and their plausible impact on Escalent’s AI strategy/approach/roadmap.
* Internal and SharePoint Documentation
	+ Prepare, maintain, and improve documents on AI\-related processes, guidelines, and protocols.
	+ Author self\-learn collateral on the in\-house and approved 3P tool mix, such as tool one\-pagers, tool usage decision flowcharts, SharePoint pages and content, etc.

**AI Upskilling**
-----------------


* Contribute to Escalent’s ongoing and ever\-expanding AI upskilling initiatives by conceptualizing ideas, developing collateral, and administering sessions.

**Candidate Profile**
---------------------


* Education:
	+ MBA / Post Graduation from a reputed management institute.
* Experience:
	+ 8\-12 years in delivering Strategic Research \& Insights engagements across industries, focused on international markets.
	+ Solid experience leading project\-based engagements and delivering findings to senior/executive client and internal stakeholders.
	+ Strong exposure to driving revenue growth through account farming, business development support, and productized offerings.
	+ Strong exposure to internal process innovation/automation.
	+ Some experience in cross\-functional, enterprise\-wide initiatives.
* Methodological / Tool Expertise:
	+ Must Have: strong exposure to Qualitative and Quantitative Primary Research, Desk Research, and Process Analytics/Innovation.
	+ Good\-to\-Have: hands\-on experience with AI and innovative tools.
	+ Big Plus: experience with low\-code/no\-code/vide\-code agent development, and working with tech/development/product teams.
* Excellent communication skills
* Team leader with strong interpersonal skills
* Logical and creative thinker with astute analytical aptitude
* Consultative approach to problem solving
* Strong attention to detail


Explore our Careers and Culture page to learn more about the people behind the brand: https://escalent.co/careers\-and\-culture/

description:
Credit Acceptance is proud to be an award\-winning company with workplace recognition in multiple categories! Our world\-class culture is shaped by dedicated Team Members who share a drive to succeed as professionals and together as a company. A great product, amazing people and our stable financial history have made us one of the largest used car finance companies in the United States.  



  

In this role, you will work as a dedicated member of a globally distributed team, partnering closely with business partners in the U.S. to design, build, and scale solutions that directly impact our customers and operations. While your legal employer will be our EoR partner, you will be fully integrated into our Credit Acceptance team for day\-to\-day work and collaboration.


We are seeking a highly motivated and experienced Staff MLE within AI team. The ideal candidate will have a strong technical background in decision science, machine learning, and generative AI with a proven track record in solving business problems and implementing large\-scale automated solutions in partnership with the respective engineering teams. In this role, you will partner with business and engineering stakeholders to formulate the vision to achieve the company’s strategic goals and co\-lead the roadmap to deliver innovative solutions for dealers, consumers and team members. As a Staff, MLE at Credit Acceptance, you will play a pivotal role in the success of this mission as you would lead the development of AI\-powered solutions across different business areas. This involves understanding the business processes, identifying new opportunities to add value using ML/AI algorithms and harnessing data sources to build state\-of\-the\-art ML/AI solutions.  

  

**Outcomes and Activities:**

* ML Outcomes:
	+ Explore and apply advanced machine learning techniques, including not limited to large language models (LLMs), deep learning, and graph neural networks, to solve complex challenges across the organization.
	+ Collaborate with management and stakeholders to define strategic roadmaps and translate them into actionable quarterly plans.
	+ Drive execution and delivery of ML/AI solutions by managing priorities, deadlines, and deliverables, leveraging your technical expertise.
	+ Design and deliver scalable, secure systems using state\-of\-the\-art AI/ML technologies and industry best practices, and nurture the culture of creating high\-quality, well\-tested systems to address critical product and business needs.
		- Troubleshoot and resolve complex technical issues to improve system reliability, scalability, and operational efficiency.
		- Ensure the security, scalability, and architectural integrity of feature designs through reviews across teams.
		- Deliver hands\-on solutions while mentoring other data professionals (including MLEs) within the organization
	+ Guide a team of MLEs across different areas:
		- Mentoring: Mentor team members on design principles, coding standards, and the adoption of AI productivity tools.
		- Recommendations – Personalize guidance across different surfaces using deep learning methods; personalize layouts with Bayesian contextual multi\-armed bandits
		- Growth: Foster long\-term growth through data\-driven causality and incrementality
		- Gen\-AI: Power existing applications with Gen AI models and engineering to improve downstream experience and decisions
		- Lifecycle \- Using ML models (such as XGBoost \& Causal Meta\-Learner\-based model, etc), proactively guide business teams across different areas
		- Engineering \- With engineering partners, build ML and Gen\-AI platform and inference pipelines for different types of models
* Gen AI Outcomes:
	+ Architect and implement enterprise\-grade LLM\-powered solutions, managing the full lifecycle from business requirements to production deployment, monitoring, and continuous optimization
	+ Design and develop multi\-agent GenAI systems using state\-of\-the\-art frameworks (LangChain, LlamaIndex) to orchestrate complex workflows across retrieval augmentation, data operations, and compliance verification
	+ Engineer robust Retrieval Augmented Generation (RAG) pipelines incorporating advanced techniques such as hybrid retrieval, reranking, query expansion, and contextual compression
	+ Implement parameter\-efficient fine\-tuning strategies (LoRA, QLoRA, PEFT) to adapt foundation models to domain\-specific use cases while optimizing for inference costs and latency
	+ Develop intelligent routing and orchestration systems to manage conversation state across multiple specialized AI agents, ensuring seamless transitions between different system capabilities
	+ Build evaluation frameworks to measure and improve LLM performance across diverse metrics, including factuality, coherence, task completion, and alignment with business objectives
	+ Integrate LLM solutions with existing enterprise architecture, ensuring compliance with data security policies, authentication mechanisms, and transaction safety requirements

**Competencies:** The following items detail how you will be successful in this role.


* Customer Empathy: Customer Empathy is the ability to understand the perspectives, pain points, and experiences of customers. It involves actively putting oneself in the customer’s shoes, comprehending their needs and challenges, and using that understanding to provide a better, more customer\-centric experience.
* Engineering Excellence: Engineering Excellence is about bringing great craftsmanship and thought leadership to deliver an outstanding product that delights customers and solves for the business. This involves the pursuit and achievement of high standards, best practices, innovation, and superior solutions.
* One Team: A One Team mindset refers to a collaborative approach across the organization, where individuals work together seamlessly, without boundaries, as a single, cohesive team. Shared goals, open communication and mutual support create a sense of collective purpose. This enables teams to navigate challenges and pursue shared objectives more effectively.
* Owner’s Mindset: Owner’s Mindset involves adopting a set of behaviors that reflect a sense of responsibility, accountability, strategic thinking, and a proactive approach to managing your domain. As an owner, you understand the business and your domain(s) deeply and solve for the right outcome for the domain(s) and the business.

**Required:**

* PhD in Computer Science, Stats, Economics, or a relevant technical field with at least 5\+ years of relevant experience or MS with at least 8\+ years of experience in machine learning and software engineering
* ML Skills: 6\+ years of hands\-on experience designing, building and deploying AI (ML, DL, Gen\-AI) models, including Reinforcement Learning algorithms, Recommendation systems, Transformers, fine\-tuned LLMs, Causal Inference, Regressions, etc., with a solid understanding of mathematics, statistics, and engineering needed to build such infra
* GenAI Skills: 4\+ years of experience building and deploying AI/ML applications including Reinforcement algorithms, Recommendation systems, Generative AI etc. with solid understanding of mathematics, Computer Science, foundation concepts and engineering behind building AI applications and LLMs
* Strong problem\-solving skills with bias for action

**Preferred:**

* ML Preference:
	+ Experience in the automotive industry, especially in building ML/AI systems while ensuring local and central regulations
	+ Experience in model interpretability and responsible AI practices.
	+ Expertise in data science, advanced experimentation and visualization techniques.
	+ Experience in designing and implementing pipelines using DAGs (e.g., Kubeflow, DVC, Ray)
	+ Ability to construct batch and streaming microservices exposed as gRPC and/or GraphQL endpoints
	+ Experience with Databricks MLflow for ML lifecycle management and model versioning
	+ Hands\-on experience with Databricks Model Serving for production ML deployments
* GenAI Preference:
	+ Demonstrable experience in parameter\-efficient fine\-tuning, model quantization, and quantization\-aware fine\-tuning of LLM models
	+ Hands\-on knowledge of Chain\-of\-Thoughts, Tree\-of\-Thoughts, Graph\-of\-Thoughts prompting strategies
	+ Experience in designing and implementing pipelines using DAGs (e.g., Kubeflow, DVC, Ray)
	+ Ability to construct batch and streaming microservices exposed as gRPC and/or GraphQL endpoints
	+ Experience with Databricks MLflow for ML lifecycle management and model versioning
	+ Hands\-on experience with Databricks Model Serving for production ML deployments
	+ Knowledge of multimodal AI (text, image, audio integration)
	+ Proficiency with GenAI frameworks/tools and technologies such as Apache Airflow, Spark, Flink, Kafka/Kinesis, Snowflake, and Databricks.
		- Demonstrable experience in parameter\-efficient fine\-tuning, model quantization, and quantization\-aware fine\-tuning of LLM models
		- Hands\-on knowledge of Chain\-of\-Thoughts, Tree\-of\-Thoughts, Graph\-of\-Thoughts prompting strategies

**Knowledge and Skills:**

* ML Requirements:
	+ Hands\-on expertise in scaling and maintaining production\-grade ML services, with a strong focus on ML/LLM Operations (versioning, automation, observability, automated training and monitoring, etc.) and ability to balance ML model complexity with production requirements
	+ Passion for identifying new business opportunities and experience of using a test and learn approach to bring scalable and efficient solutions integrating AI algorithms, ML/LLM Ops, and s/w engineering
	+ Experience partnering with the engineering, product, business operations, legal and other teams while designing, building, and executing solutions
* Gen AI Requirements
	+ Proficiency with model training/inference frameworks (PyTorch, TensorFlow, Hugging Face Transformers)
	+ Experience building conversational AI (Text, Voice) , content generation, or code generation systems
	+ Hands\-on experience with building, fine\-tuning and deploying multi\-modal LLM Models and managing the end\-to\-end model lifecycle
	+ Experience partnering with engineering, product, BizOps and other data teams while designing, building and executing solutions
	+ Deep understanding in at least three of the following areas: data mining, advanced statistics, machine learning, deep learning (incl NLP)

**CTC Range:** ₹ 63,55,839 \- ₹ 93,21,897  



  

**Total Compensation (CTC):** Final CTC will be shared during the offer stage and will include all compensation components in detail as per EoR vendor's structure.


Final compensation within the range is influenced by many factors including role\-specific skills, depth and experience level, industry background, relevant education and certifications.


**This role is hired through an Employer of Record (EoR) partner in India.**

* You will be legally employed in India through our EoR partner
* While your legal employer is the EoR partner, you will work full\-time and be fully aligned to Credit Acceptance
* Your day\-to\-day work, responsibilities, and performance expectations will be consistent with our global team members
* You will receive locally compliant payroll, benefits, and statutory coverage through the EoR partner

**Our Company Values:**

To be successful in this role, Team Members need to be:


* Positive by maintaining resiliency and focusing on solutions.
* Respectful by collaborating and actively listening.
* Insightful by cultivating innovation, accumulating business and role specific knowledge, demonstrating self\-awareness and making quality decisions.
* Direct by effectively communicating and conveying courage.
* Earnest by taking accountability, applying feedback and effectively planning and priority setting.

**Expectations:**

* Regularly overlap with U.S. business hours to support collaboration with global team members.
* Remain compliant with our policies, processes and guidelines
* All other duties as assigned
* Attendance as required by department

title: Full Stack Engineer
description:
**Job description** 

**About the Job** 

We’re on the lookout for a Backend Developer/ Full Stack Developer (MERN \+ NestJS) to join our awesome team at Sticky Cards. This is a full\-time, mid\-level position that’s fully remote, with fun company meetups for trips, celebrations, and industry events. If you’ve got 3 to 7 years of experience in building scalable applications with the MERN stack, and you’re curious about how AI/LLMs can spark new possibilities, we want you on board! At Sticky Cards, you’ll have the creative freedom to experiment and build really cool stuff for a fast\-moving industry. Plus, you’ll get the chance to attend global conferences, learn from top minds, and share your own innovative ideas with the community.

**Company Overview**

At Sticky Cards, we believe in pushing the boundaries of digital experiences. We thrive on designing card\-based solutions that make daily tasks smoother, more engaging, and downright fun. Our close\-knit team values collaboration, autonomy, and continuous learning—so expect plenty of opportunities to bring your boldest ideas to life. If you’re eager to explore the future of AI and craft experiences that wow users worldwide, Sticky Cards is your playground.

**What You’ll Do**

Dream, build, and deploy applications using the MERN stack and NestJS.

 Leverage dependency injection in NestJS to create clean, modular, and maintainable backend services.

 Integrate cutting\-edge AI/LLM features to boost user engagement and create next\-level product experiences.

 Collaborate with diverse teams—designers, product managers, QA—while enjoying plenty of space to exercise your technical creativity.

 Keep the code quality high by following best practices and taking part in friendly code reviews.

 Optimize performance to ensure smooth, fast, and scalable user experiences.

 Identify potential bottlenecks and propose fresh ideas to continuously improve system efficiency.

 Stay ahead of the curve by learning about new AI/LLM trends, bringing fresh insights to our products, and showcasing your work at global tech conferences.

 Document your design decisions and keep the team and stakeholders in the loop with regular updates.

**What We’re Looking For**

 Proficiency in JavaScript with hands\-on experience in the MERN stack (MongoDB, Express.js, React, Node.js).

 NestJS know\-how, especially regarding dependency injection and building scalable backend architectures.

 A strong handle on RESTful APIs and familiarity with microservice integrations.

 A curious mind and/or direct experience in AI/LLM technologies (e.g., using AI APIs, prompt engineering, or building custom ML solutions).

 Creative problem\-solving chops—you love tackling challenges with innovative solutions.

 Excellent communication skills, so you can explain complex ideas simply and collaborate effectively in a remote environment

.  A willingness to go the extra mile, explore, and create something extraordinary.

**Perks \& Culture**

 Remote\-first flexibility: Work from wherever you’re most inspired.

 Exciting company meetups for trips, celebrations, and global conferences—plenty of chances to travel, learn, and share your expertise.

 An environment where you’re encouraged to experiment, try new technologies, and continually push creative boundaries.

 Collaborative atmosphere that balances autonomy with support from a talented, close\-knit team.

 Opportunities to showcase your work on a global stage, influencing how people interact with digital products.

If you’re up for shaping the future of card\-based experiences, blending AI magic with top\-notch engineering, and having fun every step of the way, let’s talk! Apply now to join Sticky Cards, and let’s build something remarkable together!

**Job Type**: Full\-time

**Pay:** ₹8,00,000 \- ₹20,000,00

**Benefits:**

**Schedule**:

 Monday to Friday

 US shift

**Supplemental Pay:**

 Performance bonus

 Shift allowance

**Work Location**: Remote

Job Type: Full\-time

Pay: ₹700,000\.00 \- ₹1,800,000\.00 per year

Benefits:

* Work from home

title: IoT Integration Software Engineer – Digital Products
description:
**Job Title:** IoT Integration Software Engineer – Digital Products

**Experience:** 5\+ Years

**Location:** Remote

**Relevant Experience:** 2\+ Years in AWS IoT Ecosystem

**Joining:** Immediate / ASAP Preferred

**Role Overview:**

We are looking for an experienced IoT Integration Software Engineer to design, develop, and support cloud\-native IoT integration solutions for industrial and digital products. The ideal candidate should possess strong expertise in AWS IoT services, telemetry ingestion pipelines, edge\-to\-cloud integrations, asset modelling, and industrial IoT architectures.

This role requires hands\-on experience with AWS IoT SiteWise, AWS IoT Greengrass, telemetry ingestion, asset mapping, and industrial device integration. The candidate will act as a subject matter expert (SME) for IoT data integration and collaborate closely with hardware, platform, and application engineering teams.

**Mandatory Skills**

AWS IoT SiteWise

AWS IoT Greengrass

AWS IoT Core

Python or TypeScript

IoT Telemetry Ingestion Pipelines

Event\-Driven Architecture

Asset Modelling \& Asset Hierarchies

Industrial IoT / Operational Technology (OT)

REST APIs

Git\-based Development Workflows

Data Validation \& Monitoring

**Key Responsibilities**

IoT Integration \& Data Ingestion

Design, develop, and maintain IoT ingestion pipelines from edge devices to cloud platforms.

Implement secure and scalable telemetry ingestion architectures.

Build integrations between industrial devices and AWS IoT services.

Develop APIs and application\-ready interfaces for IoT data consumption.

AWS IoT SiteWise

Serve as the technical expert for AWS IoT SiteWise.

Create and manage asset models, hierarchies, measurements, transforms, and metrics.

Design scalable asset structures representing physical industrial systems.

Ensure proper mapping between industrial assets and digital models.

AWS IoT Greengrass \& Edge Integration

Design and deploy AWS IoT Greengrass solutions for edge computing workloads.

Enable local processing, filtering, buffering, and secure communication between edge devices and AWS cloud services.

Support offline operation and synchronization scenarios.

Asset Mapping \& Telemetry

Work with hardware and OT teams to map physical devices into digital asset models.

Ensure telemetry quality, correctness, and consistency.

Develop validation frameworks and diagnostics tools for data ingestion monitoring.

Troubleshoot ingestion failures and telemetry issues across environments.

Collaboration \& Documentation

Collaborate with platform, hardware, and application teams.

**Define and maintain standards for:**

Asset Modelling

Data Contracts

Telemetry Schemas

Integration Patterns

Document architecture, integrations, and operational procedures.

**Required Qualifications**

Bachelor's Degree in Computer Science, Engineering, Information Technology, or related field.

4–7 years of software development or integration experience.

Strong proficiency in Python or TypeScript.

Experience with cloud\-based IoT and telemetry platforms.

Understanding of event\-driven and streaming architectures.

Experience working with cross\-functional engineering teams.

Strong troubleshooting and root\-cause analysis skills.

**Preferred Qualifications**

Hands\-on AWS IoT SiteWise implementation experience.

Experience with AWS IoT Greengrass deployments.

Industrial IoT (IIoT) and Operational Technology (OT) environments.

Experience with:

RTAC Systems

DCIM Systems

Industrial Control Systems

Time\-series databases and telemetry ingestion frameworks.

Containerized applications and cloud\-native deployments.

IoT SaaS platform integrations.

GenAI/LLM exposure for operational insights and diagnostics.

Data observability and ingestion monitoring practices.

Mandatory Screening Questionnaire

Candidates must provide detailed project write\-ups covering:

**Project 1 – AWS IoT Implementation**

What assets/devices were connected?

What telemetry data was collected?

How was telemetry ingested into AWS?

Which AWS IoT services were used?

How were asset models and hierarchies designed?

What data structures were modeled and why?

What was the purpose of AWS IoT Greengrass in the solution?

How was edge\-to\-cloud communication implemented?

What challenges were faced and how were they resolved?

What specific components of the implementation did you personally own?

**Project 2 – Industrial IoT / Telemetry Integration**

Describe the industrial devices integrated.

Explain the ingestion architecture.

Describe the event streaming or telemetry processing flow.

Explain monitoring and observability mechanisms.

Describe asset mapping and validation strategy.

Mention scalability and reliability considerations.

Explain your individual contribution and ownership.

Pay: From ₹75,000\.00 per month

Work Location: Remote

title: Technical Project Manager – Odoo ERP & AI Systems
description:
**About the Position**

We are seeking a highly capable Technical Project Manager with strong Odoo ERP expertise and hands\-on AI implementation experience to lead the development and deployment of next\-generation AI\-powered business systems.

This is not a traditional project management role.

You will be responsible for driving the strategy, planning, execution, and successful delivery of Odoo\-based business platforms, AI\-powered automation initiatives, Agentic AI solutions, and intelligent business workflows.

You will work closely with stakeholders, Odoo developers, AI engineers, product teams, and leadership to transform business requirements into scalable AI\-powered operational systems.

The ideal candidate understands ERP systems, AI technologies, business operations, and software delivery, and can bridge the gap between business needs and technical execution.

**Key Responsibilities**

**Odoo ERP Leadership**

* Lead Odoo ERP implementation, enhancement, optimization, and transformation initiatives.
* Gather and document business requirements from multiple departments.
* Translate business requirements into detailed functional specifications and user stories.
* Configure and optimize Odoo workflows and business processes.
* Drive user acceptance testing (UAT), deployment planning, and adoption initiatives.
* Identify operational inefficiencies and design improved ERP workflows.

**AI Systems \& Automation**

* Lead the design and delivery of AI\-powered business solutions built on top of Odoo.
* Define AI use cases across sales, customer service, operations, compliance, logistics, finance, and management.
* Collaborate with AI engineers to implement:
* AI Agents
* Multi\-Agent Systems
* LLM\-powered workflows
* RAG applications
* AI copilots
* Workflow automation systems
* Intelligent business assistants
* Evaluate new AI technologies and identify opportunities for implementation.
* Drive AI adoption across departments and business functions.

**Project \& Program Management**

* Own project delivery from concept through deployment.
* Manage project scope, timelines, risks, budgets, and stakeholder expectations.
* Lead sprint planning, backlog prioritization, and execution tracking.
* Coordinate internal teams across Product, Engineering, AI, Operations, and Leadership.
* Ensure successful delivery of multiple concurrent initiatives.

**Team Leadership**

* Manage and coordinate internal Odoo developers, AI engineers, QA teams, and business stakeholders.
* Facilitate communication between technical and non\-technical teams.
* Drive accountability, ownership, and execution across projects.
* Mentor team members and establish project management best practices.

**Compensation**

* Market\-competitive compensation based on experience, expertise, and location.

**Bonuses \& KPIs**

Performance incentives may be tied to:

* Successful project delivery
* AI implementation outcomes
* Operational efficiency improvements
* ERP adoption and business impact
* Process automation achievements
* Team productivity and execution quality

**Work Enablement Resources**

* Odoo 18 Cloud Environment
* Dedicated Internal Development Team
* AI Engineering Team
* OpenAI, Anthropic, and AI Development Tools
* Modern Product \& Project Management Stack
* Direct Access to Executive Leadership

**Requirements**

Must Have

* 5\+ years of experience in Odoo ERP project management, implementation, consulting, or business systems leadership.
* Strong hands\-on functional expertise across:
* Sales
* CRM
* Inventory
* Purchase
* Accounting
* HR
* Operations
* Experience delivering multiple full\-cycle Odoo implementations.
* Hands\-on Odoo configuration experience.
* Experience managing software development projects and technical teams.
* Strong understanding of Agile delivery methodologies.
* Demonstrated experience implementing AI\-powered solutions in real business environments.
* Experience working with one or more of the following:
* OpenAI
* Anthropic
* AI Agents
* Agentic Workflows
* RAG Systems
* LLM Applications
* AI Automation Platforms
* Strong business process analysis and problem\-solving skills.
* Excellent written and spoken English communication skills.

**Preferred**

* Odoo v17 or v18 experience.
* Odoo.sh experience.
* Product Management or Product Owner experience.
* Experience leading AI transformation initiatives.
* Experience with LangChain, LlamaIndex, CrewAI, AutoGen, LangGraph, or similar frameworks.
* PMP, Scrum Master, Prince2, or Agile certifications.
* Odoo Certification.
* Experience in distribution, logistics, wholesale, supply chain, marketplaces, SaaS, or ERP\-driven businesses.
* What We Offer
* Opportunity to build one of the most advanced AI\-powered business operating systems in the market.
* High ownership and direct impact on company strategy.
* Fully remote global opportunity.
* Access to cutting\-edge AI technologies and tools.
* Fast\-moving, execution\-focused culture.
* Opportunity to work at the intersection of ERP, AI, automation, and business transformation.
* Long\-term career growth within a rapidly expanding organization.

Work Location: Remote

title: Agentic AI Engineer
description:
**Company:** **Location:** Delhi/NCR based candidates **Experience:** 3–5 Years **Employment Type:** Full Time

**About the Role**

We are looking for a Mid\-Level Python AI Engineer to join our growing AI engineering team and contribute to building production\-grade GenAI and agentic AI solutions for global clients.

This role is ideal for engineers with strong Python fundamentals, hands\-on experience in backend/API development, and exposure to modern AI/LLM ecosystems. You will work closely with senior engineers, product teams, and client stakeholders to develop scalable AI\-powered applications and intelligent workflows.

**Key Responsibilities**

* Develop and maintain Python\-based backend systems, APIs, and microservices.
* Build and integrate GenAI and agentic AI workflows using modern LLM frameworks.
* Contribute to development of AI\-powered applications, copilots, and automation systems.
* Work on prompt engineering, tool integrations, retrieval workflows, and orchestration pipelines.
* Collaborate with cross\-functional teams to understand business requirements and translate them into scalable technical solutions.
* Ensure code quality, performance, reliability, and maintainability of AI systems.
* Participate in deployment, debugging, testing, and optimization of production systems.
* Stay updated with emerging trends in GenAI, LLMs, and AI engineering best practices.

**Must\-Have Technical Skills**

* 3–5 years of hands\-on experience in Python development.
* Strong understanding of Python frameworks and libraries such as FastAPI, Flask, Pydantic, SQLAlchemy, etc.
